entry.title: GWAC 47QTCK18D0001 (PO0006) awarded to SCIENCE APPLICATIONS INTERNATIONAL CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITC OFFICE OF ACQUISITION OPERATIONS, INTERAGENCY CONTRACTS

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: FAR 16.505 Fair Opportunity. Only Contracting Officers with delegated procurement authority issued by the GSA GWAC Program. Ordering Period is (1) One 5-Year Base Period; and (2) One 5-Year Option Period.

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF THIS UNILATERAL MODIFICATION IS TO PROVIDE A 90-DAY FORBEARANCE ON PERFORMANCE MILESTONES AND DELIVERABLES IN CONTRACT YEAR TWO OF THE ALLIANT 2 MASTER CONTRACT. THE MODIFICATION IS HEREBY ISSUED TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: PERFORMANCE BASED STANDARD (PBS) 90 DAY FORBEARANCE DUE DATE
CONTRACTOR ENGAGEMENT, PARTICIPATION 10/01/2020 CONTRACTOR ENGAGEMENT, PRODUCTION 10/01/2020 SMALL BUSINESS SUBCONTRACT REPORTING 06/30/2020 (60 DAY EXTENSION GRANTED BY SBA) ENVIRONMENTAL OBJECTIVES AND REQUIREMENTS GHG INVENTORY REPORTING 08/31/2020
THE CHANGE IS NOT AN EXTENSION OR RESCHEDULING OF SUBSEQUENT CONTRACT YEARS' PERFORMANCE MILESTONE AND DELIVERABLES. FOR CHANGES TO ACTIVE TASK ORDERS, PRIME CONTRACTORS ARE DIRECTED TO CONTACT THE ORDERING CONTRACTING OFFICER (OCO).NO FURTHER CHANGES ARE AUTHORIZED THROUGH THE CHANGE ORDER. THE APPLICATION OF FORBEARANCE PERIOD ACTIVITY IS OPTIONAL AND LIMITED TO ONE CONTRACT YEAR'S PAST PERFORMANCE ASSESSMENT.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:legislativeMandates.ns1:otherStatutoryAuthority: OMB DESIGNATES GSA AS EXEC_AGENT FOR GOVERNMENTWIDE IT 5112(E) OF CLINGER-COHEN ACT 40 U.S.C. 11302E

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- OTHER IT AND TELECOMMUNICATIONS

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: FAR 16.505 Fair Opportunity. Only Contracting Officers with delegated procurement authority issued by the GSA GWAC Program. Ordering Period is (1) One 5-Year Base Period; and (2) One 5-Year Option Period.

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS BILATERAL CONTRACT REFRESH MODIFICATION IS TO INCLUDE THE FOLLOWING SECTIONS OF THE ALLIANT 2 GOVERNMENTWIDE ACQUISITION CONTRACT (GWAC). THIS MODIFICATION SUPERSEDES ANY PREVIOUS VERSION OF THE CONTRACT.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:legislativeMandates.ns1:otherStatutoryAuthority: OMB DESIGNATES GSA AS EXEC_AGENT FOR GOVERNMENTWIDE IT 5112(E) OF CLINGER-COHEN ACT 40 U.S.C. 11302E

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- OTHER IT AND TELECOMMUNICATIONS

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: GWAC 47QTCK18D0001 (PO0009) awarded to SCIENCE APPLICATIONS INTERNATIONAL CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITC OFFICE OF ACQUISITION OPERATIONS, INTERAGENCY CONTRACTS

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: FAR 16.505 Fair Opportunity. Only Contracting Officers with delegated procurement authority issued by the GSA GWAC Program. Ordering Period is (1) One 5-Year Base Period; and (2) One 5-Year Option Period.

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
EO14042: EO14042
THE PURPOSE OF THIS BILATERAL MODIFICATION IS TO INCLUDE THE FOLLOWING AMENDED SECTIONS OF THE FEDERAL ACQUISITION REGULATION (FAR) PERTAINING TO EXECUTIVE ORDER (EO) 14042, ENSURING ADEQUATE COVID SAFETY PROTOCOLS FOR FEDERAL CONTRACTORS AND FAR CLAUSE 52.223-99 TO YOUR GOVERNMENTWIDE ACQUISITION CONTRACT (GWAC). THIS MODIFICATION SUPERSEDES ANY PREVIOUS VERSION OF THE CONTRACT.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:legislativeMandates.ns1:otherStatutoryAuthority: OMB DESIGNATES GSA AS EXEC_AGENT FOR GOVERNMENTWIDE IT 5112(E) OF CLINGER-COHEN ACT 40 U.S.C. 11302E

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- OTHER IT AND TELECOMMUNICATIONS

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS UNILATERAL MODIFICATION IS TO ADJUST THE ESCALATION FACTOR TO 1.0485 APPLICABLE TO THE MAXIMUM RATES FOR TIME-AND-MATERIAL AND LABOR HOUR CONTRACT TYPES FOR CONTRACT YEARS 6-10.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- OTHER IT AND TELECOMMUNICATIONS

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: PURSUANT TO THE FOLLOWING FAR CLASS DEVIATIONS (CD): CD-2025-04 AND SUPPLEMENT 1 FOR REVOKED EXECUTIVE ORDER 11246, EQUAL EMPLOYMENT OPPORTUNITY AND CD-2025-05 FOR REVOKED EXECUTIVE ORDER 14057 FOR FEDERAL SUSTAINABILITY AND ENDING PROCUREMENT AND FORCED USE OF PAPER STRAWS PAYMENT: PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE: 07/01/2018 TO 06/30/2028

entry.title: GWAC 47QTCK18D0001 (PO0023) awarded to SCIENCE APPLICATIONS INTERNATIONAL CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITC OFFICE OF ACQUISITION OPERATIONS, INTERAGENCY CONTRACTS

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: FAR 16.505 Fair Opportunity. Only Contracting Officers with delegated procurement authority issued by the GSA GWAC Program. Ordering Period is (1) One 5-Year Base Period; and (2) One 5-Year Option Period.

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THE UNILATERAL MODIFICATION IS TO PROVIDE A FORBEARANCE FOR THE CONTRACTOR ENGAGEMENT PERFORMANCE REQUIREMENT IN CONTRACT YEAR 7 (JULY 1, 2024 - JUNE 30, 2025). THIS CHANGE IS LIMITED TO CONTRACT YEAR 7. NO FURTHER CHANGES ARE AUTHORIZED THROUGH THE CHANGE ORDER. THE APPLICATION OF THE FORBEARANCE PERIOD ACTIVITY IS LIMITED TO CONTRACT YEAR 7 PAST PERFORMANCE ASSESSMENT.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- OTHER IT AND TELECOMMUNICATIONS

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: FAR 16.505 Fair Opportunity. Only Contracting Officers with delegated procurement authority issued by the GSA GWAC Program. Ordering Period is (1) One 5-Year Base Period; and (2) One 5-Year Option Period.

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS BILATERAL MODIFICATION IS TO INCLUDE THE FOLLOWING AMENDED SECTIONS OF THE FEDERAL ACQUISITION REGULATION (FAR) PERTAINING TO NDAA 2019, SECTION 889(A)(1)(B): FAR SUBPART 4.21, FAR PROVISION AT 52.204-24, AND FAR CLAUSE 52.204-25 TO YOUR GOVERNMENTWIDE ACQUISITION CONTRACT (GWAC). THIS MODIFICATION SUPERSEDES ANY PREVIOUS VERSION OF THE CONTRACT.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:legislativeMandates.ns1:otherStatutoryAuthority: OMB DESIGNATES GSA AS EXEC_AGENT FOR GOVERNMENTWIDE IT 5112(E) OF CLINGER-COHEN ACT 40 U.S.C. 11302E
